Step 1 completed: Add missing `await` to the `getMessages()` call in the GET_MESSAGES WebSocket handler. Line 511: change `const messages = this.state.getMessages(channel, {` to `const messages = await this.state.getMessages(channel, {`. The handler is already async so this is safe. Error handling: the existing try/catch in the message handler covers this. Test: verify daemon compiles with `npm run build`.

Step 2 completed: Add `chatCursors?: Record<string, string>` to the VS Code Worker interface in `moe-vscode/src/types/moe.ts` (after line 202, the `teamId` field). This aligns the VS Code types with the daemon schema v5 definition at `packages/moe-daemon/src/types/schema.ts:169`. Test: verify VS Code extension compiles with `npm run compile`.
